zh.Villnäs, Lokalks, Turku pori, Finland: 芬蘭圖爾庫 亞 波里盧薩阿利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elin Nilsdotter Kurck於1400年出生在芬蘭圖爾庫 亞 波里盧薩阿利時，她的父親Nils Hermansson Kurki till Villnäs Svärd30歲，母親Cecilia Filipsdotter Folkunga Lama35歲。她於大約1414年與Magnus Klasson Fleming結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1486年在她的家鄉享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elin Nilsdotter Kurck于1400年出生在芬兰圖爾庫 亞 波里盧薩阿利时，她的父亲Nils Hermansson Kurki till Villnäs Svärd30岁，母亲Cecilia Filipsdotter Folkunga Lama35岁。她于大约1414年与Magnus Klasson Fleming结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1486年在她的家乡享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kurck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Bürck): variant of Burk . Compare Buerck .

variants.name: Burk
meanings: South German (also Bürk): from a short form of the personal name Burkhard (see Burkhart ). Compare Buerk .
German: habitational name from the common placenames Burk and Burg.
Sorbian: status name or nickname from Upper Sorbian burk, a diminutive of bur ‘peasant’ (see Buhr ).

nameMeanings.name: Elin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Elen
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

en.lifeSummary: When Elin Nilsdotter Kurck was born in 1400, in Louhisaari, Turku ja Pori, Finland, her father, Nils Hermansson Kurki till Villnäs Svärd, was 30 and her mother, Cecilia Filipsdotter Folkunga Lama, was 35. She married Magnus Klasson Fleming about 1414. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1486, in her hometown, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elin Nilsdotter Kurck est née en 1400, à Louhisaari, Turku ja Pori, Finlande, son père, Nils Hermansson Kurki till Villnäs Svärd, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Filipsdotter Folkunga Lama, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Magnus Klasson Fleming environ 1414. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1486, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elin Nilsdotter Kurck 1400 in Louhisaari, Turku ja Pori, Finnland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nils Hermansson Kurki till Villnäs Svärd 30 und ihre Mutter Cecilia Filipsdotter Folkunga Lama 35. Sie hat um 1414 Magnus Klasson Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1486 im Alter von 86 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elin Nilsdotter Kurck è nata il nel 1400 nel Louhisaari, Turku ja Pori, Finlandia, sua padre, Nils Hermansson Kurki till Villnäs Svärd, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Cecilia Filipsdotter Folkunga Lama, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Magnus Klasson Fleming circa 1414. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1486, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.Villnäs, Lokalks, Turku pori, Finland: フィンランドトゥルク ジャ ポリロウヒサアリ
ja.lifeSummary: Elin Nilsdotter Kurckが1400年にフィンランドトゥルク ジャ ポリロウヒサアリで生まれた時，父Nils Hermansson Kurki till Villnäs Svärdは30歳，母Cecilia Filipsdotter Folkunga Lamaは35歳であった。約1414年にMagnus Klasson Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1486年に故郷で86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elin Nilsdotter Kurck(이)가 1400년 핀란드 터르쿠 자 포리 루히사아리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nils Hermansson Kurki till Villnäs Svärd(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecilia Filipsdotter Folkunga Lama(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1414년 Magnus Klasson Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 그녀의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elin Nilsdotter Kurck nasceu em 1400, em Louhisaari, Turku ja Pori, Finlândia, seu pai, Nils Hermansson Kurki till Villnäs Svärd, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Filipsdotter Folkunga Lama, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Magnus Klasson Fleming aproximadamente 1414. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1486, em sua cidade natal, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elin Nilsdotter Kurck родилась в 1400 г. в местности лоухисаари, турку джа пори, Финляндия, её отцу по имени Nils Hermansson Kurki till Villnäs Svärd было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Filipsdotter Folkunga Lama, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Magnus Klasson Fleming около 1414 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1486 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elin Nilsdotter Kurck nació en 1400, en Louhisaari, Turku ja Pori, Finlandia, su papá, Nils Hermansson Kurki till Villnäs Svärd, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Cecilia Filipsdotter Folkunga Lama, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Magnus Klasson Fleming aproximadamente 1414. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1486, en su pueblo, a la edad de 86 años.
